name: MUX
description: Multiplexer - combines multiple signals into a single vector output
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="MUX" blockType="c" dependsOnU="1" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="multiplex" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="MUX">
    <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="2" />
    </ScilabString>
    <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0" />
    <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="2" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
        <data line="0" column="0" value="0" />
    </ScilabInteger>
    <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0" />
    <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="0" width="0" />
    <Array as="oDState" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <Array as="equations" scilabClass="ScilabList" />
    <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="100.0" y="100.0" width="10.0" height="40.0" />
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Very narrow width (10) - minimal visual representation
dataLines=0 on output - dimension is computed from inputs
exprs value must match integerParameters value
criticalRules: MUST include ALL standard parameter blocks (realParameters, integerParameters, objectsParameters, etc.)
Output is a vector combining all inputs
commonUses: Connecting to blocks expecting vector inputs
